title: Ben Johnson
subTitle: Johnson, the honourable son of a dreaded local thug, decides to erase the bad image of his father in the society. He becomes a police officer and fights to bring criminals to justice.

title: Rakshakan
subTitle: Mukundan faces many challenges when he has to solve all his financial liabilities just with the income he gets by running a garage.

title: Red Salute
subTitle: A group of corrupt politicians fight to acquire an old palace. However, things take a turn when the court rules in favour of Mithran and Joseph.

title: Pulliman
subTitle: Kunjunni, an orphan, and Radha, who makes a living by selling statues of deities, love each other. However, problems arise when her father opposes their relationship.

title: Swapnakoodu
subTitle: Three men compete against each other to win the affections of a beautiful woman. However, complications arise when her mother suffers from a heart attack.

title: Natturajavu
subTitle: Pulikkattil, an affluent family man, is forced to bear the brunt and burden of his late father's unscrupulous past. Now, Karnan, a jail convict, decides to settle some old scores with him.

title: Thanneermathan Dinangal
subTitle: Jaison, a teenager, has a crush on Keerthy, but she does not reciprocate his feelings. To make things worse, he gets in trouble with Ravi, the new teacher who is liked by everyone, especially Keerthy.

title: Kantara
subTitle: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

title: Christian Brothers
subTitle: When the daughter of a minister gets kidnapped, Christy is called upon to rescue her. Although he manages to save her, he himself gets embroiled in the kidnapper's murder.

title: Njandukalude Nattil Oridavela
subTitle: Kurian, a naive man, visits home from London expecting for his nuptials. Later, he learns about his mother's cancer and supports her through the treatment.

title: Njandukalude Nattil Oridavela
subTitle: Kurian, a naive man, visits home from London expecting for his nuptials. Later, he learns about his mother's cancer and supports her through the treatment.

title: Mikhael
subTitle: When rival gang members are killed mysteriously, the police begin an investigation. Later, their probe leads them to a physician who is seeking retribution.

title: Oru Kaatil Oru Paykappal
subTitle: When Sara's homestay receives Ajith as a guest, he falls for her. However, unbeknownst to him, Sara's father arranges for her to marry a rich man.

title: Mizhi Thurakku
subTitle: Savithri's family is attacked, after which she seeks refuge in a man's house. However, she soon experiences the evils of casteism.

title: June
subTitle: June, a teenager, believes that there is nothing remarkable about her. She experiences adolescent crushes, handles heartbreaks and fights insecurities as she grows into a mature and confident woman.

title: Take Off
subTitle: Sameera, an Indian nurse working in Iraq, and her colleagues are held hostage by terrorists. Later, Indian ambassador Manoj uses his wit to rescue them and get them out of the country alive.

title: The Great Indian Kitchen
subTitle: A newly married woman tries to become an ideal wife and daughter-in-law to her traditional and patriarchy family. Eventually, their growing demands and disrespect cause rifts between them.

title: Helen
subTitle: Trapped in a bitterly cold place, Helen holds on for dear life even as hope starts fading away. Meanwhile, her worried father Paul races against time to track her down.

title: Ohm Shanthi Oshaana
subTitle: Pooja Mathew, a spirited young girl, dreams about marrying only for love. Thus, she stops at nothing to impress Giri, who saved her once from a group of unruly men.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey
subTitle: Jayabharathi, an ambitious girl, strives to complete her education. However, when her parents marry her off, she attempts to carve an identity for herself.

title: C/O Saira Banu
subTitle: A hard-working postwoman lives a contended life with her adopted son. However, her simple life is jeopardised after her beloved son is imprisoned under a false charge.

title: C/O Saira Banu
subTitle: A hard-working postwoman lives a contended life with her adopted son. However, her simple life is jeopardised after her beloved son is imprisoned under a false charge.

title: Rani Padmini
subTitle: Rani and Padmini, two women with different agendas, embark on an unfamiliar journey while getting to know each other and help each other through personal conflicts.

title: Seelabathi
subTitle: Seelabhati along with her mother visits a remote village where she starts working as a computer teacher. When some students mysteriously disappear, the villagers start blaming her educational course.

title: Ente Ummante Peru
subTitle: A youth's quest for his birth mother takes an unexpected turn when his late father's widow, Aisha, enters his life, altering his path.

title: Romeo
subTitle: Ganesh, a poor man, falls in love with Shruti, a rich girl. In order to marry her, he resorts to lies and pretends to belong to an affluent family, which complicates his relationship with Shruti.

title: RDX
subTitle: Robert, Dony and Xavier grow up together while honing their fighting skills. However, after an incident separates them for several years, an attack on their family reunites the three friends.

title: Keshu Ee Veedinte Nadhan
subTitle: The life of an ordinary driver Keshu turns upside down when he wins a lottery worth 12 crores but his morality gets tested.

title: Nna Thaan Case Kodu
subTitle: A former thief embarks on a treacherous quest for justice after a powerful MLA falsely frames him, testing his determination.

title: Kilichundan Mambazham
subTitle: Moidukutty Haji returns to his village after taking a third wife, despite his other wives' disapproval. Unbeknownst to him, his young and beautiful new bride, Amina, is secretly in love with Abdu, a bangle seller.

title: Nerariyan CBI
subTitle: Years after a young woman, Mythili, is murdered in a supposedly haunted mansion, Sethurama Iyer, a CBI officer, decides to find the culprit and solve the mystery.
